issue: Builder delayed flat registration after full payment
summary: Buyer paid the full amount but the builder failed to register the flat within the agreed period.
judgment: Builder was directed to complete registration and pay compensation.

issue: Possession delayed after booking and advance payment
summary: Flat possession was delayed despite repeated assurances from the builder.
judgment: Court ordered possession with interest and costs.

issue: Tenant refused to vacate after termination notice
summary: Landlord sought eviction after service of valid notice and continued non-payment.
judgment: Tenant was directed to vacate and clear arrears.

issue: Money recovery for unpaid supply invoices
summary: Supplier filed recovery proceedings for unpaid invoices after several reminders.
judgment: Defendant was ordered to pay principal with interest.

issue: Failure to complete agreed construction work
summary: A contractor failed to finish work on time despite advance payment and repeated notices.
judgment: Specific performance and damages were granted.

issue: Defective goods and refusal to refund
summary: Consumer complained of defective goods and non-response from the seller.
judgment: Refund and compensation were awarded.

case_name: Amit Verma v. State Housing Board
issue: Interim stay against demolition and possession transfer
summary: Petitioner sought urgent restraint on demolition and transfer of possession.
judgment: Temporary injunction was granted pending final hearing.

issue: Execution of sale deed after complete payment
summary: Buyer sought execution of sale deed after paying the entire consideration.
judgment: Seller was directed to execute the deed and hand over documents.

case_name: Vikram Sen v. TechNova Pvt. Ltd.
issue: Termination without due process and unpaid dues
summary: Employee challenged abrupt termination and sought unpaid wages.
judgment: Reinstatement and wage arrears were directed.

case_name: Farah Khan v. Arjun Family Trust
issue: Claim for maintenance after separation
summary: Wife sought maintenance and support after separation from spouse.
judgment: Monthly maintenance was awarded.

issue: Cheating by promising job and taking money
summary: Accused collected money on the pretext of arranging a job and never returned it.
judgment: Bail was denied due to strong prima facie material.

issue: Misappropriation of entrusted funds
summary: Funds entrusted for business use were allegedly diverted for personal benefit.
judgment: Trial court order was upheld with directions for speedy trial.

issue: Bail in financial offence investigation
summary: Accused sought bail in a financial offense involving alleged forgery.
judgment: Interim protection was granted with conditions.

issue: Physical assault during neighborhood dispute
summary: Complaint alleged physical assault after a verbal confrontation.
judgment: Accused was convicted on the testimony of eyewitnesses.

issue: Theft of mobile phones from a shop
summary: Police recovered stolen mobile phones from the accused.
judgment: Conviction was recorded after recovery evidence.

issue: UPI fraud and phishing complaint
summary: Victim transferred money after a fake payment link and phishing message.
judgment: Investigation was ordered to continue with cyber cell assistance.

issue: Cruelty and harassment at matrimonial home
summary: Complaint alleged repeated harassment and intimidation by the husband.
judgment: Protection and residence relief were granted.

issue: Quashing of FIR after compromise between parties
summary: The parties settled the dispute and sought quashing of the FIR.
judgment: FIR was quashed in view of a genuine compromise.

issue: Bail in NDPS seizure matter
summary: Accused sought bail after recovery of contraband during vehicle search.
judgment: Bail was refused due to statutory restrictions.

issue: Contradictory eyewitness testimony in theft case
summary: The prosecution case weakened because key witness statements were contradictory.
judgment: Accused was acquitted due to unreliable evidence.

issue: Alleged murder arising from a property dispute
summary: The accused was alleged to have caused the death of the complainant's brother during a property dispute.
judgment: Bail was rejected and the matter was committed to trial.
